title: Meta AI image detector fails to identify some of its own cropped AI images: Analysis
summary: In an ​analysis of 40 images generated using Muse Image, Reuters found the detection tool verified all of the original AI-generated images but ​failed to verify 55% of the same images after they were cropped to approximately one-third to one-half of their original size.

title: Grocery chain Sumosave Retail raises Rs 50 crore led by 12 Flags
